name: maze of caves
description: I'm in a maze of caves
hints: A maze room with an opening and a pile of bat guano! This is the key room in the maze.
The bat guano is useful - it contains saltpeter for making explosives. The opening leads somewhere new.
GET GUAN for the guano (saltpeter = explosive ingredient). W leads to another cave (33). GO OPEN to exit.
N=28 (self-loop). S=26. E=25. W=cave (33). GET GUAN for explosives. Opening leads out of maze area.
notes: Key maze room with opening and bat guano. W=cave (33). N=28 (loop). S=26. E=25. GET GUAN for saltpeter (explosives). GO OPEN exits maze.
